title: Books: Rechanted
description: Color-coded enchantments with special max-level bookmarks and combined books textures.
body:
# Books Rechanted
*Enhances enchanted books with intuitive visual cues through color-coded ribbons that indicate enchantment types with special bookmarks that only appear on maximum-level enchantments. This clever design makes scanning librarian villager trades significantly faster, allowing players to instantly recognize top-tier enchantments without reading descriptions. Perfect for efficiently populating trading halls with optimal enchantment villagers, this texture pack transforms the tedious hunt for max-level enchantments into a streamlined, visually guided experience with refined glint effects that improve overall gameplay clarity.*

## Features
  - Brand new refreshed textures for all types of books
  - Unique color tinted ribbons for every enchantment in the game
  - Special bookmark indicator for maximum level enchantments
  - Custom texture for books with multiple enchantments
  - Reduced intensity of the enchantment glint effect

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
